experiment: BF16 GEMM via Peano (public AIE API vector intrinsics)
toolchain: IRON (mlir-aie) + Peano (LLVM-AIE) — COMPLETELY OPEN SOURCE, NO CHESS
milestone: First BF16 GEMM using vector intrinsics through the complete open-source stack. The public AIE API (aie::mmul, aie::load_v, aie::store_v) compiles and runs correctly via Peano. No Chess involvement.
conclusion: The open-source compiler path (IRON -> Peano -> AIE2P ELF -> NPU) can now use the same AIE API vector intrinsics as the Chess-compiled path. Scaling to multi-tile and larger matrices is the remaining engineering work.
